notes: All 9 reps correctly capture the printed skeleton (website www.registradores.org, all four finca numbers 32840/32885/32803/32871, DNI 20041185C, phone 635889002, titular ID 50183525D, full GDPR block) — a strong baseline. Per the strict hallucination rules, none of these responses fabricated content that isn't on the form: the email-domain spellings, the Borrador '412' vs 42, the Entrada '116.56' decimal, the titular-surname variants and the handwritten applicant name/email are all misreads of text that IS visible, so they are key_misses rather than hallucinations. The only applicant email actually printed (joansnobc@gmail.com) is never reproduced exactly — every rep invents a plausible alternative, which is the largest consistent error. The handwritten surname 'Almiñana Moropsa' is rendered variously as Almirall Moragas/Morales, Almirahs Morales/Moropos, and similar — never correct. The website www.registradores.org is read perfectly by all reps; the email domain is harder (most drop the 'i' in 'propriedad', one adds an extra 'l', one drops an 'a'). Temperature 0.7 reps show more degradation (accent corruption in rep2, dropped titular-ID digit in rep0) but no catastrophic failures or hallucination.
